headline: NODE Monthly Commentary: May 2026
summary: NODE returned +16.5% in May, with shares climbing from $40.40 to $47.07. NODE topped the S&P 500 (+5.1%), the Nasdaq 100 (+10.5%), Bitcoin (-3.8%), and Ethereum (-11.0%).
